images.alt: Two overlapping Matcha Nichi menus, one olive green and one cream, listing matcha drinks and sweets with Japanese subtitles and prices, held against a blurred café backdrop.
Olive green typographic spread with the Satoshi typeface name centered in cream, surrounded by oversized cropped letterforms and columns of small placeholder specimen text.
Two Matcha Nichi business cards on a bed of green matcha powder: an olive card with contact details and a charcoal card with the cream wordmark and Japanese logo.
